segments.title: Techniques
segments.description: Techniques and methods for software development, testing, and delivery.
segments.label: Quadrant 1

segments.title: Platforms
segments.description: Platforms and infrastructure for running and deploying software.
segments.label: Quadrant 2

segments.title: Tools
segments.description: Software tools that support development, testing, and operations.
segments.label: Quadrant 3

segments.title: Tips
segments.description: Practical tips, best practices, and recommendations.
segments.label: Quadrant 4

rings.title: Adopt
rings.description: Technologies and practices we recommend for broad adoption. These have been proven in production and provide clear value.

rings.title: Trial
rings.description: Technologies worth pursuing. We have seen them work successfully and recommend teams to trial them in appropriate projects.

rings.title: Assess
rings.description: Technologies worth exploring. We find them promising and recommend looking at them when facing a specific need.

rings.title: Hold
rings.description: Technologies we recommend against using for new projects. Existing usage may continue but consider alternatives for new work.

labels.title: AI Technology Radar
labels.footer: Maintained by Portfolio & Delivery at Red Hat. Visualization powered by AOE Technology Radar (open source).
labels.metaDescription: AI Technology Radar - Portfolio & Delivery at Red Hat. Tracking technology choices across Techniques, Platforms, Tools, and Tips.
